Runtime authority remains in reviewed source packages, ANALYZER_V2_GATEWAY_TASKS, canExecuteAnalyzerV2GatewayTask(...), UCM/task policy, and Captain/deputy approvals.

entries.liveJobBlockReason: X7-W2 source package explicitly allows no live jobs. Product-internal hidden candidate-provider network execution is implemented only for the approved Wikimedia Core REST Search page-search endpoint, and live proof requires a later reviewed execution package after commit/runtime refresh. The research_acquisition gateway task remains notImplemented.
entries.notes: X7-W2 is now the latest product-route Source Acquisition proof after X7-V, X7-W1A, X7-W1B, and X7-W1C. It implements implemented_product_internal_candidate_provider_network_hidden_no_source_material: accepted Query Planning handoff plus X7-V intake and X7-W1A admission feed the X7-W1B candidate runtime through one product-owned hidden candidate-provider network loop. The only approved provider endpoint is wikimedia_core / ep_wikimedia_core_page_search at api.wikimedia.org /core/v1/wikipedia/en/search/page with GET, q-only request parameters, no limit parameter, credentials not_required_for_approved_network_provider, redirect policy exactly deny, proxy none, JSON pages array identity-only projection, max two query entries, max three candidate records per query, bounded bytes and timeout, fixedDollarCost 0, and no raw query/provider payload exposure. X7-W2 records bounded admin-only artifacts through an internal no-store route and carries cost/timing/outcome/byte telemetry while sanitizing lower-layer network-attempt details. X7-W1C remains the pre-IO fence context, X7-W1B remains the closed-loop prerequisite, X7-W1A remains the admission prerequisite with admission_ready_no_runtime_execution, X7-V remains the intake prerequisite with intake_ready_not_executable, and X7-F remains the historical closed no-IO execution gate with gate_closed_no_io. X6/X7-D/X7-E/X7-F/X7-G1/X7-G2 remain regression/historical context, not the active forward product route. Parser B2 remains locally parser_isolation_unavailable, B3 requires provisioned rootless OCI proof, C0-S1 adds a P0 admission contract labelled not a security boundary without parser execution, C0-S2 adds process-local parser-admission provenance, and C0-S3 adds parsed-material denial with no parsed material. 2D-C remains blocked. Source material, content dereference, parser/cache/SR/storage, EvidenceCorpus, evidence/report/verdict/warning/confidence generation, public cutover, ACS/direct URL, V1 reuse, V1 cleanup, and live jobs remain blocked. Wikimedia Core REST Search is a time-bound hidden proof dependency with deprecation review required before future provider expansion. Register remains audit-only and grants no execution.
